exercises.hindiScript: चलो समय बर्बाद मत करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.audioScript: Let us build a better tomorrow.
exercises.question: What did you hear?
options: Let him build a better tomorrow.
Let us build a better tomorrow.
exercises.answer: Let us build a better tomorrow.

exercises.question: What did you hear?
options: Let him look at the data.

exercises.hindiScript: चलो इस बारे में बहस मत करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.hindiScript: चलो साथ में celebrate करते हैं!
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.hindiScript: चलो अपने tasks को priority दें।
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.hindiScript: चलो इस मौके को जाने मत देते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.audioScript: Let us commit to our goals.
exercises.hindiScript: आइए हम अपने goals के प्रति प्रतिबद्ध हों।
exercises.question: What did you hear?
options: Let him commit to the goals.
Let us commit to our goals.
exercises.answer: Let us commit to our goals.

exercises.hindiScript: चलो एक नई शुरुआत करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?
options: Let him make a fresh start.

exercises.hindiScript: चलो यह decision जल्दबाज़ी में मत करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?

exercises.hindiScript: चलो इस project पर मिलकर काम करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear?
options: Let him collaborate on the project.

dictationPassage.text: Let's start the meeting. Let's look at last week's data. Let's not be discouraged. Let us consider this a learning opportunity. Let's brainstorm new ideas together. Let's not wait until Friday to take action.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: चलो मीटिंग शुरू करते हैं। चलो पिछले हफ्ते का data देखते हैं। चलो निराश मत होते हैं। आइए इसे सीखने का अवसर मानते हैं। चलो मिलकर नए ideas brainstorm करते हैं। चलो Friday तक कदम उठाने का इंतज़ार मत करते हैं।
